Track work, code, and ship software with: Track work, code, and ship software with Azure Boards, Repos, and Pipelines.
Your Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g. https://dev.azure.com/mycompany)
Your Azure DevOps PAT with Work Items (R: Your Azure DevOps PAT with Work Items (Read & Write) and Project and Team (Read) scopes.
To get your Personal Access Token (PAT)::
To get your Personal Access Token (PAT):

1. Go to **Azure DevOps** and click your profile icon (top-right)
2. Select **Personal access tokens**
3. Click **+ New Token**
4. Give it a name and set expiration
5. Under **Scopes**, select:
   - **Work Items**: Read & Write
   - **Project and Team**: Read
6. Click **Create** and copy the token (you won't see it again)

**Organization URL** is your Azure DevOps URL, e.g. `https://dev.azure.com/mycompany`

Select the person to assign this work it: Select the person to assign this work item to. Only project team members are listed — use the Custom API Call action if you need to assign a user outside your teams.

Numeric ID of the work item (e.g. 123). To pass it dynamically, reference the ID from a previous step (e.g. `{{trigger.id}}`), not the title.
Type of the work item. Used only to load: Type of the work item. Used only to load the matching list of states below — it does not change the work item's type. Changing type requires a separate Azure DevOps operation not supported here.
Numeric ID of the work item (e.g. 123). To pass it dynamically from a previous step, use a reference like `{{trigger.id}}` or the output of a Get/List step — not the title.
New title for the work item: New title for the work item
New description for the work item (suppo: New description for the work item (supports HTML)
New state for the work item. Leave empty: New state for the work item. Leave empty to keep the current state.
The WIQL query to execute. Default: SELE: The WIQL query to execute. Default: SELECT [System.Id] FROM WorkItems WHERE [System.TeamProject] = @project ORDER BY [System.ChangedDate] DESC
Maximum number of work items to return (: Maximum number of work items to return (default: 50, max: 200)
The comment text to add (supports HTML): The comment text to add (supports HTML)

HEAD: 黑色
Fires instantly when a work item is crea: Fires instantly when a work item is created, updated, or commented on in Azure DevOps via a Service Hooks subscription. Requires a public webhook URL reachable from Azure DevOps.
Polls Azure DevOps every few minutes and: Polls Azure DevOps every few minutes and fires when a work item is created or updated. Use this when your Activepieces instance is not reachable from the public internet; otherwise prefer the Instant trigger. Pick a work item type to unlock the state filter.
Filter by work item type. Leave empty to: Filter by work item type. Leave empty to trigger for all types.
Which work item lifecycle events should: Which work item lifecycle events should trigger this flow. Select at least one.
Filter by state. Leave empty to trigger: Filter by state. Leave empty to trigger for all states.
